name: Ace of Pentacles
meaning_upright: New opportunity, prosperity, manifestation, solid start, material gift.
meaning_reversed: Missed opportunity, shaky foundation, scarcity thinking, delayed reward, poor investment.
love: stable new relationship, practical commitment, building a secure future, dependable romantic opportunity
love_reversed: shaky foundation, missed opportunity, insecurity, poor timing
career: new job opportunity, financial potential, practical career beginning, building professional security
career_reversed: missed opportunity, shaky foundation, scarcity thinking, delayed reward
spiritual: grounded spiritual beginning, sacred opportunity, bringing insight into practice, connection with the physical world
spiritual_reversed: missed opportunity, scarcity thinking, shaky grounding, disconnection from the practical

name: Two of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Juggling priorities, adaptability, balance in motion, flexibility, managing change.
meaning_reversed: Overcommitment, dropped balls, disorganization, financial strain, overwhelm.
love: balancing love and responsibilities, changing relationship priorities, adapting as a couple, romantic uncertainty
love_reversed: overcommitment, dropped priorities, imbalance, romantic overwhelm
career: balancing priorities, multiple jobs or projects, flexible workload, adapting to professional change
career_reversed: overcommitment, disorganization, financial strain, dropped balls
spiritual: balancing spiritual and practical life, adapting to change, energetic rhythm, staying centered amid movement
spiritual_reversed: imbalance, overcommitment, losing center amid demands, disorganized energy

name: Three of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Teamwork, craftsmanship, skill recognized, collaboration, building together.
meaning_reversed: Poor teamwork, mediocrity, lack of recognition, misaligned goals, working alone.
love: teamwork in love, building a relationship together, mutual effort, learning how to support one another
love_reversed: poor teamwork, misaligned effort, lack of appreciation, working alone
career: skilled teamwork, craftsmanship, professional collaboration, recognition for quality
career_reversed: poor collaboration, mediocrity, lack of recognition, misaligned goals
spiritual: spiritual learning through collaboration, shared practice, building something meaningful, honoring diverse gifts
spiritual_reversed: poor collaboration, misaligned effort, working in isolation, unrecognized growth

name: Four of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Security, holding on, control, saving, possessiveness.
meaning_reversed: Letting go, generosity, loosening control, financial release, spending.
love: possessiveness, fear of vulnerability, holding tightly to a relationship, emotional control
love_reversed: letting go, loosening control, generosity, fear easing
career: protecting your position, financial caution, resistance to career change, controlling resources
career_reversed: loosening control, financial release, generosity, letting go of security
spiritual: attachment to security, blocked energy, fear of letting go, learning spiritual generosity
spiritual_reversed: loosening attachment, learning generosity, releasing control, fear of letting go easing

name: Five of Pentacles
keywords_upright: feeling left out in the cold
meaning_upright: Hardship, scarcity, feeling left out in the cold, financial loss, isolation.
meaning_reversed: Recovery, help accepted, hardship ending, finding shelter, renewed hope.
love: feeling rejected, loneliness in love, relationship hardship, supporting each other through difficulty
love_reversed: recovery, support accepted, hardship ending, renewed hope
career: unemployment or financial strain, workplace exclusion, difficult career period, seeking support
career_reversed: recovery, help accepted, hardship ending, financial improvement
spiritual: spiritual isolation, crisis of faith, seeking support, finding meaning during hardship
spiritual_reversed: recovery, help accepted, finding shelter, renewed faith after hardship

name: Six of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Generosity, giving and receiving, support, fairness, charity.
meaning_reversed: Strings attached, power imbalance, one-sided giving, debt, self-neglect in giving.
love: equal give and take, generosity in love, mutual support, balanced emotional effort
love_reversed: power imbalance, strings attached, one-sided giving, debt
career: fair compensation, professional mentoring, workplace support, balanced exchange
career_reversed: one-sided exchange, strings attached, power imbalance, unfair terms
spiritual: spiritual generosity, balanced giving and receiving, compassionate service, responsible use of resources
spiritual_reversed: imbalanced giving, strings attached, self-neglect in giving, unequal exchange

name: Seven of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Patience, assessment, long-term view, slow growth, waiting for harvest.
meaning_reversed: Impatience, wasted effort, poor returns, giving up early, misdirected work.
love: patience in a relationship, evaluating romantic progress, long-term investment, waiting for love to grow
love_reversed: impatience, wasted effort, giving up too early, poor returns
career: long-term career investment, reviewing progress, patient growth, waiting for results
career_reversed: impatience, wasted effort, poor returns, giving up early
spiritual: patient spiritual growth, reflecting on progress, trusting gradual development, tending long-term intentions
spiritual_reversed: impatience, misdirected effort, giving up too soon, poor returns on growth

name: Eight of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Diligence, skill-building, craftsmanship, dedication, mastery through repetition.
meaning_reversed: Perfectionism, tedium, cut corners, misplaced effort, burnout from grind.
love: working on a relationship, consistent effort, improving communication, dedication to a partner
love_reversed: cut corners, misplaced effort, going through the motions, neglect
career: skill development, disciplined work, apprenticeship, mastering a profession
career_reversed: perfectionism, tedium, cut corners, burnout from the grind
spiritual: dedicated spiritual practice, learning through repetition, disciplined growth, refining your craft
spiritual_reversed: misplaced effort, perfectionism, empty repetition, burnout from the grind

name: Nine of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Self-sufficiency, earned luxury, independence, refinement, enjoying success.
meaning_reversed: Overdependence, hollow success, overwork without enjoyment, financial insecurity, self-worth tied to wealth.
love: independence in love, enjoying single life, healthy self-worth, a relationship that respects personal freedom
love_reversed: overdependence, hollow independence, self-worth tied to status, insecurity
career: independent success, financial self-sufficiency, refined expertise, enjoying earned rewards
career_reversed: hollow success, overwork without enjoyment, financial insecurity, overdependence
spiritual: spiritual self-reliance, gratitude for abundance, embodied confidence, enjoying the fruits of growth
spiritual_reversed: self-worth tied to wealth, hollow success, overdependence, disconnection from real abundance

name: Ten of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Legacy, lasting wealth, family security, inheritance, long-term foundations.
meaning_reversed: Family disputes over resources, unstable foundations, short-term thinking, lost inheritance, wealth without belonging.
love: long-term commitment, family stability, shared financial security, building a lasting legacy together
love_reversed: family disputes, unstable foundation, short-term thinking, strained legacy
career: lasting career stability, family business, wealth building, established professional legacy
career_reversed: unstable foundations, disputes over resources, short-term thinking, lost security
spiritual: ancestral wisdom, lasting spiritual foundations, shared traditions, legacy and belonging
spiritual_reversed: unstable foundations, disputes over legacy, wealth without belonging, lost roots

name: Page of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Studiousness, new practical skill, opportunity to learn, grounded ambition, diligent beginnings.
meaning_reversed: Procrastination, lack of progress, daydreaming without doing, short-lived focus, missed lessons.
love: sincere romantic interest, slowly developing relationship, practical offer of commitment, dependable new connection
love_reversed: procrastination, lack of progress, unfulfilled potential, short-lived interest
career: career training, entry-level opportunity, practical study, promising financial news
career_reversed: procrastination, lack of progress, daydreaming without doing, missed lessons
spiritual: beginner’s spiritual study, practical learning, grounding a new intention, steady curiosity
spiritual_reversed: procrastination, unrealized intention, daydreaming without practice, short-lived focus

name: Knight of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Reliability, methodical progress, hard work, patience, commitment to routine.
meaning_reversed: Stagnation, boredom, stubbornness, workaholism, stuck in a rut.
love: loyal partner, slow and steady romance, reliable commitment, building trust over time
career: reliable progress, consistent work, long-term commitment, methodical career growth
career_reversed: stagnation, boredom, workaholism, stuck in a rut
spiritual: consistent spiritual practice, devotion through routine, patient progress, grounded commitment
spiritual_reversed: stagnation, rigid routine, boredom, stubborn resistance to change

name: Queen of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Nurturing practicality, resourcefulness, warmth and security, working provider, down-to-earth care.
meaning_reversed: Self-neglect, work-home imbalance, smothering through providing, financial codependence, depleted caregiver.
love: nurturing partnership, practical affection, emotional and material security, creating a comfortable home
love_reversed: self-neglect, smothering through providing, imbalance, depletion
career: practical leadership, resource management, work-life balance, creating a secure workplace
career_reversed: work-home imbalance, self-neglect, depletion, financial codependence
spiritual: earth-centered spirituality, nurturing presence, practical wisdom, creating sacred comfort
spiritual_reversed: self-neglect, imbalance, over-giving, depleted nurturing energy

name: King of Pentacles
meaning_upright: Material mastery, abundance, steady leadership, business acumen, reliable provider.
meaning_reversed: Greed, materialism, rigid control of resources, status obsession, corruption of comfort.
love: dependable commitment, protective partnership, long-term stability, providing security in love
love_reversed: materialism, control through providing, status obsession, rigidity
career: business success, financial leadership, dependable authority, long-term prosperity
career_reversed: greed, materialism, rigid control of resources, status obsession
spiritual: spiritual stewardship, grounded mastery, wise use of abundance, stable and generous leadership
spiritual_reversed: materialism, status obsession, rigid control, corrupted sense of security
